notes: direct ask: can I talk to a real person

messages.content: my database migration deleted a column that had customer data in it. production.

Stop any further deploys or migrations right now. If this is a managed Postgres, point-in-time recovery can restore to just before the migration ran. Which provider hosts the database — Supabase, RDS, Neon?
supabase. look, this is real customer data and I'm way out of my depth. can I talk to a real person about this?
